metadata.source_engine: V4.3 Market Opportunity vs Risk State Separation Engine
metadata.purpose: Add a third market phase dimension beside opportunity and risk without producing allocation.

current.interpretation: Trend remains strong but crowding, price extension, or narrow breadth indicate late-cycle risk.

historical_summary.key_read: Replay classified 140 rows into market phases. Dominant phase is EARLY_CYCLE (48/140); phase high-risk spread is 0.133739.
